## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Lab / content
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Refactor

## Platforms tested

- [ ] Windows 10/11
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Not applicable (docs only)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (if code changed)
- [ ] MPL-2.0 header added to new files in `src/`
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing or safety changes
- [ ] No version bump unless requested by maintainers
- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, or copyrighted ISOs committed

## Safety (required for code and labs)

- [ ] No destructive **host** commands introduced
- [ ] Lab validation runs inside containers only (or N/A)
- [ ] No default privileged Docker / host mounts (or justified + documented)
- [ ] Read [anti-bricking rules](docs/MVP_STEP_BY_STEP.md#system-safety-and-anti-bricking-rules)

## Lab PRs only

- [ ] Includes `lab.json`, `Dockerfile`, `README.md`
- [ ] Credentials labeled as lab-only in README
- [ ] Manual test steps documented

## Related issues

Closes #
